meta.taskName: Availability + DemoLesson models + migrate Certificate to TutorProfileId

prompt.goal: Add TutorAvailability and DemoLesson entities. Migrate TutorCertificate from temporary UserId FK to TutorProfileId (schema-aligned). Minimal AccountController fix so project still builds.
prompt.hardRules: - NO UI for Availability / DemoLesson (later tasks) - NO Admin approve / AI verify - NO redesign Certificates view beyond compile fix - DayOfWeek convention: 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday (.NET DayOfWeek) - Data migration: map UserId → TutorProfiles.Id; delete unmapped cert rows if any
prompt.scope: - Models: TutorAvailability, DemoLesson - TutorCertificate: TutorProfileId required; remove UserId - DbContext Fluent API + navigation collections on TutorProfile - Migration with SQL data step - AccountController: query/upload by TutorProfileId; if no profile, block upload with clear message
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Tables TutorAvailabilities, DemoLessons exist in migration - [ ] TutorCertificates.TutorProfileId FK; no UserId - [ ] dotnet build pass - [ ] Account Certificates still compiles and uses profile when present
prompt.outputRequired: - Models/TutorAvailability.cs, DemoLesson.cs, TutorCertificate.cs (updated) - ApplicationDbContext.cs, TutorProfile.cs (nav props) - AccountController.cs (minimal) - Migration - Prompt + Report
